concept: Imagine playing as a freelance exorcist in a city where buildings are possessed by spirits rather than people. Develop different techniques to communicate with, appease, or banish architectural entities depending on whether they're benevolent or malevolent presences. Navigate the politics between human residents, real estate developers, and the ancient spirits with competing claims to urban spaces. Discover an underground movement of radical spirits and humans working together to awaken the slumbering consciousness of the entire city itself.
